orb_30m.name: ORB 30m
orb_30m.description: Opening Range Breakout on the first 30 minutes of RTH session

params.Entry: First 5m close beyond the range (max 1 trade/day)
params.Stop: Far side of opening range (price-based, not time-based)

ema_cross_5m.name: EMA Cross 5m
ema_cross_5m.description: EMA 9/100 crossover on 5-minute RTH bars with trend and volatility filters. Long only — short crosses exit an open long but do not open shorts.

params.Direction: Long only (short side disabled — PF 0.95 pre-2021, fails era gate)
params.Entry: Long cross bar close, market order
params.Exit: Short cross exits long (no new short) or EOD flat (whichever first)

overnight.name: Overnight
overnight.description: Overnight NQ long bias — enter at 19:59 ET, exit at next session open. Shelved June 2026 due to margin cost and correlated macro risk.

params.Reason: Margin cost, correlated drawdown, insufficient edge

dc_exit3.name: DC Mean Reversion
dc_exit3.description: Donchian Channel daily mean reversion — buy when RTH close < prior 10-day low; exit on first up-close or 5-day time stop. Long only.

params.Signal: Daily close < prior 10-day low (DC lower band, shifted)
params.Exit (up-close): First day where close > signal-day close

gold_short.name: Gold MeanRev (short)
gold_short.description: Micro Gold (MGC) daily short-reversion — short when the COMEX settle makes a new 10-day high; commodity strength reverts. Executing on the Tradovate DEMO sandbox since 2026-06-26 (HYP-24), isolated from the live MNQ book.

params.Signal: Daily settle > prior 10-day high → SHORT next open
params.Exit (up-close): First daily close back above signal-day close

crude_short.name: Crude MeanRev (short)
crude_short.description: Micro Crude (MCL/WTI) daily short-reversion — short when the NYMEX settle makes a new 10-day high. Executing on the Tradovate DEMO sandbox since 2026-06-26 (HYP-25), isolated from the live MNQ book. 16y ratio-adjusted data incl. 2020.

params.Signal: Daily settle > prior 10-day high → SHORT next open
params.Exit (up-close): First daily close back above signal-day close

recent.reason: Strategy requires real-time ADX(14), +DI(14), -DI(14) indicator state as entry/exit triggers, not price-pattern-only signals. ADX threshold recalibration (20→25) is a tuning parameter on an indicator, not a price action rule. Breakout template architecture does not support indicator-gated entries or indicator-collapse exits; it requires price levels (ranges, bands, breakout bars) as primary signals. This strategy is indicator-adaptive and violates the rule that backtest templates work from bar OHLCV alone without live indicator state.

Backtest exception: int() argument must be a string, a bytes-like object or a real number, not 'NoneType'
   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/gordongekko/gekko-research/src/auto_backtest.py", line 695, in _run_calendar
    entry_dow = int(p.get("entry_dow", 0))

TypeError: int() argument must be a string, a bytes-like object or a real number, not 'NoneType'

Calendar-gated entry (day-of-month == 1,2,3) with institutional regime filter (prior close > 20-day SMA) and fixed 3-day holding window. This is a calendar-seasonal strategy, not a price-action template (breakout, reversion, MA cross, or session momentum). The architecture requires dynamic price levels (support/resistance, bands, or session anchors) or time-defined momentum windows; calendar-day gating alone violates the systematic backtest framework because: (1) month-turn rebalancing effect is regime-dependent and not reproducible without live flow data, (2) the 20-day SMA filter introduces look-ahead bias if computed on daily close before 5m entry decision, (3) the 3-day fixed hold conflicts with intraday 2% stop (creates conflicting exits), and (4) the hypothesis relies on unobservable institutional flows rather than market microstructure (volume, volatility, price action). Recommend: backtest separately as a calendar overlay or convert to session_momentum (detect large Asia/pre-US move and ride it) if rebalancing concentrates in a specific UTC window.
Era gate FAIL (2010-2020 PF 0.63 | 2021-2026 PF 0.99); WF 12/16 sit-outs
Era gate FAIL (2010-2020 PF 0.81 | 2021-2026 PF 0.94); WF 13/16 sit-outs

projections.note: 16-year backtest projection, 1 contract each. Gold/Crude execute on the Tradovate DEMO sandbox since 2026-06-26 (HYP-24/25), isolated from the live MNQ book. EMA is long-only.

ytd_equity.note: 2026 YTD running equity, 1 contract each, deployed config (trend20 ORB, gated long-only EMA, DC) + Gold/Crude demo shorts. Backtest/OOS model — not realized fills.

commodity_demo.note: Gold/Crude demo sandbox (1 micro each) — isolated from the live MNQ book.
